description_long: This nightstand features a dark wood finish with a rectangular body and two spacious drawers, each fitted with sleek, horizontal brass bar handles. The top surface is adorned with a round, textured ceramic lamp with a beige fabric shade and a small, glossy black planter containing a green plant. The nightstand stands on four outwardly angled, tapered wooden legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood grain texture, while the front is defined by the drawers and handles. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative carvings or patterns. The combination of functional storage and decorative items on top makes it suitable for both residential and hospitality urban environments.
description: A dark wood nightstand with two brass-handled drawers, tapered legs, and a lamp and planter on top, exuding a mid-century modern style.
description_view_0: Front view showing two brass-handled drawers, lamp, and planter on the top surface.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wood grain side panel, lamp, and planter.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the unadorned back panel and the arrangement of the lamp and planter.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear look at the lamp's base and the side panel, with the planter partially visible.
